flasks.name: Flask of Alchemical Chaos
flasks.notes: Standard flask. Always use before any group content.

flasks.name: Flask of Tempered Aggression
flasks.notes: Budget option. Slightly weaker but much cheaper.

food.name: Feast of the Midnight Masquerade
food.notes: Best option. Wait for feast in raids. Bring your own for M+.

food.name: Seared Silvermoon Steak
food.notes: Personal food. Haste is our best secondary. Use in M+.

food.name: Moonlight Glazed Ribs
food.notes: Alternative if you need Mastery over Haste for your build.

potions.name: Potion of Unwavering Focus
potions.notes: Use during Incarnation/CA window. Pre-pot 1 sec before pull, second pot during second Incarnation.

potions.name: Algari Healing Potion
potions.notes: Emergency heal. Separate cooldown from combat potions.

weaponEnhancement.name: Thalassian Phoenix Oil
weaponEnhancement.value: Chance to deal fire damage and grant Intellect
weaponEnhancement.notes: Best weapon oil for Balance. Apply before every session. Lasts 1 hour.

augmentRune.name: Crystallized Augment Rune
augmentRune.notes: Persists through death. Always active. Buy the reusable one from rep vendor.

raidNightChecklist: Seared Silvermoon Steak (20 for the night)
Potion of Unwavering Focus (2 per boss = ~20)
mythicPlusChecklist: Potion of Unwavering Focus (2-3 per key)
